Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,697,321Details
International Box Office $46,309,108
Worldwide Box Office $93,006,429
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,434,487
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,888,152
Total $9,322,639
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Halloween comes to life in a brand-new comedy adventure based on R.L. Stine’s 400-million-selling series of books.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,802,225 (33.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.96 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,521 opening theaters/3,723 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $61,306,254

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 12th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 10th, 2018 (Wide) (Trinidad)
October 10th, 2018 (Wide) (Jamaica)
October 11th, 2018 (Wide) (Dominican Republic)
October 11th, 2018 (Wide) (Aruba)
October 11th, 2018 (Wide) (Uruguay)
Video Release: January 15th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for scary creature action and images, some thematic elements, rude humor and language.
(Rating bulletin 2545 (Cert #51436), 9/19/2018)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Franchise: Goosebumps
Cast, crew, or production detail: Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Plot point: Circus, Creature Feature, Living Toys
Social setting: Halloween, Supernatural
Subgenre: Kids Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Sony Pictures Animation, Original Film, Scholastic Entertainment Inc., Silvertongue Films
Production Countries: United States, Australia
Languages: English
